task_details: Scan the most recent 7 plan files in storage_agents/plans/. For each daily plan, check meal variety: no single food category (PROTEIN, GRAIN, VEG, FRUIT, DAIRY) should account for more than 60% of items across the day. If any plan violates this, swap one item to balance.
rationale: Local time 18:11 Israel is outside the 22-03 UI/feature window, so the three UI/feature tasks (improve_copy, two add_feature_flagged) are filtered out. That leaves only one allowlisted data-fix task in the queue — improve_variety, LOW. No backlog (10/10 work orders have build reports), and last-5 verdicts show no rejects (3 approve, 2 uncertain), so the circuit breaker is clear and we can proceed with the daytime data-fix filler.
acceptance_criteria: The 7 newest plan_*.json files under storage_agents/plans/ each have no food category (PROTEIN, GRAIN, VEG, FRUIT, DAIRY) exceeding 60% of items per day after the fix
Plans are joined against the food catalog to look up category per food_id (plan items do not carry a category field, only food_id/food_name)
Any plan that required a swap has exactly one item replaced; replacement food_id exists in the existing food catalog (no new foods added)
After swap, total daily kcal of the plan stays within ±5% of the pre-swap total
Plans that already satisfy the 60% rule are left unmodified (no spurious edits)

Each modified plan is written back as a sibling file with suffix _variety_fix.json (do not overwrite the original) and includes a 'variety_fix' provenance block listing original_item food_id, replacement food_id, and the category share before/after
files_likely_to_change: storage_agents/plans/*_variety_fix.json (new sibling files for any plan that violated the 60% rule)
nutrition_app/agents/agent4_inventory.py or nutrition_app/agents/agent5_planner.py (if a reusable variety helper is added)
execution_hint: Direct script: load the 7 newest plan_*.json by mtime, join each item's food_id against the food catalog (contracts/ or data/ — Agent 3 owns the catalog) to get categories, compute per-day category share, and for any plan where share>0.60 pick one item from the over-represented category and replace with a same-meal item from an under-represented category preserving ±5% kcal. Write outputs as <original>_variety_fix.json. No CLI executor exists for this task type — a small standalone Python script in nutrition_app/scripts/fix_plan_variety.py is the cleanest path.
